title: Monvillea estevesii
taxonomy: Monvillea estevesii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae. However, it is now reclassified in the family Peraceae. This reclassification was due to molecular and morphological studies. As a result, Monvillea estevesii is now placed in the genus Monvillea. It is native to Chile and is an epiphytic cactus-like plant.

The plant has been traditionally used to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of constipation, diarrhea, and irritable bowel syndrome, due to its potential to regulate gut motility and reduce inflammation.
